checks.describe: core-internals profile is up: kind context kind-kubeadv-core answers and the worker node exists
nimbusai-gateway Deployment converged to 4 ready replicas after the scale step
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get deploy nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}'

checks.describe: observedGeneration equals generation — the controller has processed the latest spec revision
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get deploy nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.metadata.generation} {.status.observedGeneration}' | awk '{ print ($1 == $2) ? "CONVERGED" : "LAGGING " $0 }'

checks.describe: Deployment reports condition Available=True for the converged state
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get deploy nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Available")].status}'

checks.describe: all gateway Pods carry the app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nimbusai platform label
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nimbusai --field-selector=status.phase=Running --no-headers | wc -l | tr -d ' \n'

checks.describe: Deployment controller events record the scale-up of the gateway ReplicaSet
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get events --field-selector reason=ScalingReplicaSet -o jsonpath='{.items[*].message}'

checks.describe: FailedScheduling events prove the replacement Pod was refused while the worker was cordoned
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get events --field-selector reason=FailedScheduling -o jsonpath='{.items[*].message}'

checks.describe: worker node is schedulable again — spec.unschedulable was cleared by the uncordon
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get node kubeadv-core-worker -o jsonpath='{.spec.unschedulable}'
